errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.defaultMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Try again, or pick something else.
errors.appErrorMessage: This page ran into an error. Try again, or pick something else from the sidebar.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.deleteConfirm: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
conversations.empty: No conversations yet. Start a new chat.
conversations.connectionFailed: Could not connect to the chat.

projects.title: Projects
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete this project? Its conversations will move to "No project", not be deleted.
projects.emptyThreads: No conversations in this project yet.

mcpServers.title: Tool servers (MCP)
mcpServers.empty: No tool servers yet. Conversations in this project have no MCP tools.
mcpServers.addError: Could not add this tool server. Check the fields and try again.
mcpServers.removeConfirm: Remove "{name}"? Conversations in this project will lose access to its tools.

settings.title: Settings
settings.adminCreditsDescription: Adjust your own shared-key credit balance.
settings.apiKeysDescription: Bring your own API key for a provider to use it instead of the shared default.
settings.notConfigured: Not configured — using shared default key

admin.title: Users
admin.description: Manage user accounts and shared-key credit balances.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.invalidOrExpired: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

register.checkEmailMessage: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address. Please click it to activate your account before logging in.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm your email
confirmEmail.successMessage: Your email has been confirmed. You can now log in.
confirmEmail.invalidOrExpired: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.

login.emailNotVerified: Please confirm your email address before logging in.
